headings.text: Find Your Buyers Before They Raise Their Hand
Three reasons Lumivex wins the race to the inbox
From silent intent to qualified meeting in 72 hours.
Stop chasing forms. Start chasing buyers.

paragraphs.text:
Lumivex listens across 14 000+ behavioral, hiring, technographic and
        intent signals — surfacing the accounts about to enter market weeks
        before they fill out a single form.
No credit card · 14-day pipeline guarantee · SOC 2 Type II
Our intent model fires an average of 19 days before a target account requests a demo from anyone in your category.
Composite scoring blends hiring, tech-stack moves, executive changes, and content footprint into one decision-ready number.
Salesforce, HubSpot, Slack, Apollo, Outreach — surface alerts where your reps already work, in under five clicks.

Lumivex continuously crawls 200+ public and licensed
        signal sources, scores them against your ICP, and routes the warmest
        accounts straight to a rep before the competition even notices.
Spin up your first signal feed in under nine minutes — no procurement call, no implementation team.
B2B signal intelligence for growth teams that refuse to wait for the form fill.
